reviews.comment:
Antes vendian repuestos, por ej.: Baterías. Y cuando tenías una emergencia el auxilio también te la instalaba. Ahora ya no venden repuestos.
En resumen aumenta la cuota y disminuyen los servicios. Cada vez peor...

(Translated by Google)
They used to sell spare parts, like batteries. And if you had an emergency, roadside assistance would install them for you. Now they don't sell spare parts anymore.
In short, the premium goes up and the services go down. It's getting worse and worse...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJOF9lU2NnEAE
